log_copying_repair: Copying volume contents and running repair. Please wait...
log_success_restore: SUCCESS: Volume successfully copied and repaired in separate recovery folder!
log_success_verify: SUCCESS: All files verified and are clean/bit-perfect!
log_index_fail: No individual damaged files identified, but the index verification failed. The PAR3 archive itself might be damaged.
app_copyright: Copyright \u00a9 2001-2026 Sander Raaijmakers, Elwin Oost and the Burn to the Brim team
integrate_ctx_chk: Integrate with Windows Explorer Context Menu
restart_notice: Language preferences saved. Please restart Burn to the Brim to apply the changes.
move_files_chk: Move fitted folders/files to target folder
create_symlinks_chk: Create symbolic links in target folder (Default)
span_chk: Span across multiple volumes (Volume_1, Volume_2, etc.)
tooltip_import_json: Import and parse offline JSON index files to view solved volume file details.
tooltip_verify_restore: Verify solved volumes or copy and restore damaged files using PAR3 archives.
tooltip_test: Simulate packing without performing file operations to test volume utilization.
tooltip_start: Run solver and organize files/folders according to preferences.
tooltip_stop: Abort current running packing or file organization process.
tooltip_create_iso: Create ISO filesystem images from the solved volumes.
tooltip_source: Semicolon-separated paths of folders to pack and consolidate.
tooltip_target: Destination path where volumes will be organized and written.
tooltip_semantic: Enter a prompt like 'keep audio together' to analyze files via MiniLM.
tooltip_move: Move/cut original files/folders directly into target volume folders.
tooltip_symlink: Create filesystem symbolic links in target volume folders (non-destructive).
tooltip_span: Enable spanning contents into multiple sequentially named folders.
tooltip_trace: Log detailed diagnostics showing how folders/files are selected and split.
help_guide_title: Burn to the Brim (BTTB) Help Guide
save_cv_tooltip: Save current capacity, sector, and slack as a named custom volume
start_tooltip: Start organizing files into optimal volumes
test_tooltip: Simulate organizing files and calculate metrics without modifying files on disk
stop_tooltip: Stop the current solver or copy operation
source_tooltip: Source directory containing the files to organize
target_tooltip: Destination directory where organized volumes will be created
semantic_tooltip: Specify a semantic description to cluster similar files using MiniLM AI
move_tooltip: Move files to their destination volumes instead of copying or symlinking them
symlink_tooltip: Create symbolic links of the files at their destination instead of copying them
span_tooltip: Fit remaining files into multiple volumes sequentially instead of just the first volume
trace_tooltip: Show extra verbose tracing and performance metrics in the logs
